interpretation.consequence: Operations failing this exact test are section-dependent and cannot define braid/Hopf-link data on the quotient or on HB_39.
interpretation.kernel_descent_test: A tube-pair operation Phi descends through P:TubePair->Loop iff P Phi = R P for some quotient operator R; equivalently Phi(ker P) is contained in ker P. This verifier checks A == (A S) P on each source/target base block using the certified section S.
interpretation.minimal_survivors: Only the exact descending operations survive the full 44,224-dimensional projection-kernel boundary.

verified_claims: The audit tests candidate annular/tube-pair operations against the full projection kernel, not only against the 297-dimensional quotient.
The identity operation descends through the projection and acts trivially on HB_39.
The certified dual-swap/transposition operation descends through the projection kernel and acts trivially on the 39 Drinfeld sectors.
The annular pair-swap and dual-each pair rotation are exactly obstructed: they do not preserve the projection kernel, so they cannot supply section-independent braiding or Hopf-link data.
This identifies the missing modular input as a genuine new braid/Hopf-link operator on the full tube-pair complex, not another quotient-section choice.
